description: SDXL 1.0 + Watercolor Style LoRA (ostris) — converts any prompt into a watercolor painting
_comment: LoRA trained by ostris on SDXL 1.0 base. Transforms any subject into watercolor art without requiring a trigger word.
_comment_trigger: No trigger word needed — the LoRA activates on any prompt at lora_scale 1.0.
_comment_lora_scale: 1.0 is the recommended default per model card. Increase or decrease as needed for stronger/subtler style.
_comment_steps: SDXL default range 30–50 steps. 30 is sufficient for LoRA styles.
_comment_cfg: CFG 7.5 is a safe SDXL default. Range 5–9 works well.
_comment_negative: Negatives are generally not needed. 'blurry, low quality' can help if quality is poor.
_comment_offload: Enable on ≤16 GB unified memory to avoid OOM.
